DEFENDANTS PREVAILED ON THEIR ANTI-SLAPP MOTION AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. (CCP 425.16(C)(1).) THE ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS SOUGHT ARE REASONABLE. ACCORDINGLY, WITHIN 30 DAYS, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS OF $ 8,027.50 TO DEFENDANTS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS YICK KEUNG BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION & PING CHIU's MOTION TO DETERMINE AMOUNT OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS RECOVERABLE AGAINST PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 is Granted. Defendants prevailed on their anti-SLAPP motion against Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. (CCP 425.16(c)(1).) The attorney fees and costs sought are reasonable. Accordingly, within 30 days, Plaintiff shall pay attorney fees and costs of $ 8,027.50 to Defendants. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H.
